final_answer: To reduce the risk of getting COVID-19, it is important to avoid crowded places and maintain physical distance of at least 1 metre from others. Wearing a mask in public where community transmission is present and physical distancing isn't possible is also recommended. Frequent hand washing with soap and water or using alcohol-based hand rub is crucial. Ensuring good ventilation in indoor spaces can help reduce virus spread. Getting vaccinated is essential to help reduce the spread of the virus and its mutations [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00016].
